A minimalist 2D black line-art stickman doctor standing straight facing forward in a clear front view. Features: circular head, stick limbs, simple eyes, a nose, a mouth, ears, and exactly two strands of white hair on the top of his head. He wears a modern, stylish short-cropped jacket in sky blue color, paired with short white shorts/pants. The sky blue jacket has a tiny chest pocket on the top-left with a pencil tucked inside and a small red cross logo. His stick hands are tiny, small white mitten-style hands (only the thumb is separated, in a rounded shape, very small), and his stick legs end with very small, tiny, neat, simple white shoes on his feet.

A classic minimalist 2D single-line stickman (졸라맨) made of thin solid black lines standing straight facing forward in a clear front view. The character is completely bare, without any clothes, shirts, pants, shoes, or gloves. The head is a simple perfect empty circle outlined in a thin black line. Crucially, his thin stick arms and legs end with extremely simple, small, thin empty oval outlines for his hands and feet (no detailed fingers, no shoes). Features: two small black dots for eyes, a simple line for a smiling mouth, and exactly two strands of thin black hair on top of his head.
